name: rne-candlestick-chart
description: Candlestick (OHLC) chart with optional volume bars and moving averages (MA5, MA10, MA20)

data.name: data
data.description: Candlestick data: array of [open, close, low, high] per period.

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: X-axis category labels. If omitted, indices (0, 1, 2, ...) are used. Example: ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed']

volumeData.name: volumeData
volumeData.description: Optional volume data (bar series below candlestick). Length should match data.

ma5.name: ma5
ma5.description: Optional MA5 (5-period moving average) line. Length should match data.

ma10.name: ma10
ma10.description: Optional MA10 (10-period moving average) line. Length should match data.

ma20.name: ma20
ma20.description: Optional MA20 (20-period moving average) line. Length should match data.

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Default: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Default: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override. Merged with default theme from ChartThemeContext.

boundaryGap.name: boundaryGap
boundaryGap.description: Whether to leave gaps at the start and end of the axis. Default: false

minX.name: minX
minX.description: Optional minimum for the category X-axis. When omitted, derived or automatic.

maxX.name: maxX
maxX.description: Optional maximum for the category X-axis. When omitted, derived or automatic.

intervalX.name: intervalX
intervalX.description: Optional tick interval for the X-axis. When omitted, automatic.

minY.name: minY
minY.description: Optional minimum for the price (value) Y-axis. When omitted, derived or automatic.

maxY.name: maxY
maxY.description: Optional maximum for the price (value) Y-axis. When omitted, derived or automatic.

intervalY.name: intervalY
intervalY.description: Optional tick interval for the price Y-axis. When omitted, automatic.

showXAxis.name: showXAxis
showXAxis.description: Whether to show the X-axis line and labels. Default: true

showXAxisTicks.name: showXAxisTicks
showXAxisTicks.description: X-axis tick marks when showXAxis is true. Default: true

showYAxis.name: showYAxis
showYAxis.description: Whether to show the Y-axis line and labels. Default: true

showYAxisTicks.name: showYAxisTicks
showYAxisTicks.description: Y-axis tick marks when showYAxis is true. Default: true

showXAxisSplitLines.name: showXAxisSplitLines
showXAxisSplitLines.description: Whether to show vertical grid lines. Default: true

showYAxisSplitLines.name: showYAxisSplitLines
showYAxisSplitLines.description: Whether to show horizontal grid lines. Default: true

xAxisLabel.name: xAxisLabel
xAxisLabel.description: Label text for the X-axis (displayed along the axis).

yAxisLabel.name: yAxisLabel
yAxisLabel.description: Label text for the Y-axis (displayed along the axis).

grid.name: grid
grid.description: Grid positioning. Example: {left: '10%', right: '5%', bottom: '10%', top: '10%'}

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to display a legend for moving-average lines when MA data is set. Default: true

legendPosition.name: legendPosition
legendPosition.description: Placement of the legend: 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'. Top and bottom use a horizontal legend with wrapping; left and right use a vertical legend. Default: 'bottom'

showHighlighter.name: showHighlighter
showHighlighter.description: Whether to show the highlighter when interacting with the chart. Default: true

xAxisTickLabelFormatter.name: xAxisTickLabelFormatter
xAxisTickLabelFormatter.description: Formatter for X-axis tick labels. (value, index?) => string

yAxisTickLabelFormatter.name: yAxisTickLabelFormatter
yAxisTickLabelFormatter.description: Formatter for Y-axis tick labels. (value, index?) => string
